headline: Second half opens with one game — Mets at Phillies
body: Only one game on the July 16 slate: Christian Scott (NYM) at Aaron Nola (PHI), 7:10 ET. One confirmed under lean — Scott, on a Tommy John build-up (capped mid-80s pitches, hasn't cleared the 5th lately), projects ~13 outs. Nola is a struggling but durable vet with no cap — defer to market, no play. Tendencies, not guarantees; verify at first pitch, flat units.
